---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Send payload `...`
2. Observe output `...`

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- ADK version: [e.g. 2.1.0 — run `uv run python -c "import google.adk; print(google.adk.__version__)"`]
- agents-cli version: [e.g. 0.5.1 — run `agents-cli --version`]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem here (e.g. Pub/Sub payload that triggered the issue).
